notes: Budgets are guardrails for local/CI validation sustainability.
They are not performance claims or trading/model performance metrics.
warn_threshold_ratio: budgets allow up to 15% overage before warning.
Budgets based on observed Phase 1016 baseline: fast_total ~85s, pytest_fast ~82s.
required_components: must be measured, missing causes warn/fail.
optional_components: nice to have, missing does not cause overall warn.
